member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Configuration.DailyIndex.MaxIndexAge
member.summary: This should never be negative or less than the index time period (day or a month)

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Configuration.VersionedIndex.GetCurrentVersionAsync
member.summary: Returns the current index version (E.G., the oldest index version).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.EntityType
member.summary: The entity type that this custom field is for.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.TenantKey
member.summary: The tenant key which could be a composite key that this custom field belongs to. Each tenant can have it's own set of custom fields for an entity.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.Name
member.summary: The friendly custom field name.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.Description
member.summary: The custom field description.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Gets or sets the display order.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.ProcessMode
member.summary: Sets the process mode for this custom field instance. Default is to only process the field when there is a value. Can be set to in order to always run the even when a value is not present.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.ProcessOrder
member.summary: Sets the order in which the custom field is processed. Custom fields in the mode will always run after fields in mode.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.IndexType
member.summary: The type of index this custom field value should be stored in. (ie. string, number, float, address)

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.IndexSlot
member.summary: The reserved indexing slot for this custom field. This name will be pooled across tenants for the same index type to keep dynamic indexes in Elasticsearch from exploding.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.Data
member.summary: Any additional custom data that needs to be associated to this custom field.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.UpdatedUtc
member.summary: Date the custom field was last updated.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Date the custom field was originally created.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.IsDeleted
member.summary: Whether this custom field has been soft deleted

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition.GetIdxName
member.summary: Returns the Elasticsearch sub-field name used under the idx object for this definition. The format is {IndexType}-{IndexSlot} (e.g., "string-1", "int-3").

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldProcessMode
member.summary: Controls when a custom field's is invoked during document save.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldProcessMode.ProcessOnValue
member.summary: Process only when the document's Data dictionary contains a value for this field. This is the default.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldProcessMode.AlwaysProcess
member.summary: Always run the field type processor, even when no value is present. Use for calculated/computed fields that derive their value from other fields. These fields are always processed after all fields.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveVirtualCustomFields
member.summary: Implement this interface on entities that need custom fields with full control over how field values are read and written. Use instead of when custom field values are not stored in a flat dictionary.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveVirtualCustomFields.GetCustomFields
member.summary: Returns all custom field values for this entity.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveVirtualCustomFields.GetCustomField(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the value of a custom field by name, or null if not set.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveVirtualCustomFields.SetCustomField(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets the value of a custom field by name.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveVirtualCustomFields.RemoveCustomField(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a custom field by name.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveVirtualCustomFields.Idx
member.summary: Gets the indexed custom field values. The framework populates this automatically during save.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveVirtualCustomFields.GetTenantKey
member.summary: Returns the tenant key used to scope custom field definitions for this entity.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveCustomFields
member.summary: Implement this interface on entities that store custom field values in their dictionary. The framework reads values from Data, processes them through , and writes indexed values to during save.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveCustomFields.Idx
member.summary: Gets the indexed custom field values. The framework populates this automatically during save.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.IHaveCustomFields.GetTenantKey
member.summary: Returns the tenant key used to scope custom field definitions for this entity.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ICustomFieldDefinitionRepository.GetFieldMappingAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a cached name-keyed dictionary of all active (non-deleted) custom field definitions for the specified entity type and tenant. Results are cached for 15 minutes.
member.param: The entity type name (e.g., nameof(Employee)).
The tenant key returned by .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ICustomFieldDefinitionRepository.FindByTenantAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns all custom field definitions for the specified entity type and tenant, including active definitions only (soft-deleted are excluded unless IncludeSoftDeletes is used on a separate query). Results are paginated with up to 1000 documents per page; use to iterate.
member.param: The entity type name (e.g., nameof(Employee)).
The tenant key returned by .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ICustomFieldDefinitionRepository.AddFieldAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a new with an automatically assigned slot and adds it to the repository. If a definition with the same name and type already exists for this tenant, the existing definition is returned.
member.param: The entity type name (e.g., nameof(Employee)).
The tenant key returned by .
The friendly field name.
The index type (e.g., "string", "int", "bool", "date"). See built-in field type classes for valid values.
An optional description of the field.
An optional display order hint for UI rendering.
Optional additional metadata to associate with the definition.
member.exception: Thrown when a definition with the same name but a different type already exists for this tenant.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinitionRepository.RemoveByTenantAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Hard-deletes all custom field definitions for the specified entity type and tenant, freeing both names and slots for reuse. This is not on the interface.
member.param: The entity type name (e.g., nameof(Employee)).
The tenant key returned by .

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ICustomFieldType
member.summary: Defines a custom field type that controls how values are processed during document save and how the Elasticsearch mapping is configured for the field's index slots.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ICustomFieldType.Type
member.summary: Gets the unique type identifier (e.g., "string", "int", "bool"). This must match the of definitions using this type.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ICustomFieldType.ProcessValueAsync``1(``0,System.Object,Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.CustomFieldDefinition)
member.summary: Processes a custom field value during document save. Called for each custom field that matches this type. Override to transform, validate, or compute values.
member.param: The document being saved.
The current value from Data (may be null for fields).
The custom field definition for this field.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ICustomFieldType.ConfigureMapping``1(Nest.SingleMappingSelector{``0})
member.summary: Configures the Elasticsearch mapping for index slots of this type. This is used in dynamic templates to map idx.{type}-* fields.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ProcessFieldValueResult
member.summary: Contains the result of processing a custom field value via .

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ProcessFieldValueResult.Value
member.summary: The processed value to store back in the document's Data dictionary.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ProcessFieldValueResult.Idx
member.summary: An optional separate value to store in the Idx dictionary for indexing. When null, is used for both storage and indexing.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.ProcessFieldValueResult.IsCustomFieldDefinitionModified
member.summary: Set to true if the processor modified the itself (e.g., updated metadata in ). This triggers a save of the definition.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.CustomFields.StringFieldType
member.summary: Maps a custom field as a text field with a .keyword sub-field for exact matching. The call to AddKeywordField() is required by the NEST beta for Elasticsearch 8.x+. Without it, text fields lack the .keyword sub-field needed for aggregations, sorting, and exact-match filtering.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Queries.Builders.FieldConditionsQueryBuilder
member.summary: Translates objects and trees stored on the query options bag into Elasticsearch filter clauses.

remarks.para: Registered as a default query builder in . Runs after SoftDeletesQueryBuilder and DateRangeQueryBuilder.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Queries.Builders.FieldIncludesQueryBuilder
member.summary: Elasticsearch query builder that applies _source filtering based on field includes and excludes.

remarks.para: At execution time, this builder merges field includes and excludes from all sources into a single set:

If a field appears in both includes and excludes, the include takes precedence (the exclude is dropped). Required fields registered on the repository are automatically injected when caller-specified field restrictions are active.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticReadOnlyRepositoryBase`1.AddDefaultExclude(System.String)
M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticReadOnlyRepositoryBase`1.AddRequiredField(System.String)
member.summary: Registers a field that must always be present in Elasticsearch _source filtering results when any field restrictions (.Include(), .Exclude(), .IncludeMask(), or .ExcludeMask()) are active. When no restrictions exist, the full _source is returned and required fields have no effect. When includes are present, required fields are added to the include set. When only excludes are present, required fields are removed from the exclude set to preserve "return everything except X" semantics.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticReadOnlyRepositoryBase`1.SetCacheClient(Foundatio.Caching.ICacheClient)
member.summary: Sets the cache client used by this repository, replacing any previously configured cache. This is useful for injecting a specific cache client (e.g., a keyed DI service) in derived repositories.
member.param: The cache client to use, or null to disable caching.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticReadOnlyRepositoryBase`1.DisableCache
member.summary: Disables caching for this repository by replacing the cache client with a .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticReindexer.GetLockName(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the distributed lock resource name for serializing reindex operations on the given alias.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticReindexer.TryCancelTaskAsync(Nest.TaskId,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to cancel the Elasticsearch server-side reindex task. Best-effort — failures are logged but not propagated.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.HasDateTracking
member.summary: Gets whether this repository supports automatic date tracking for patch operations. When true, , , and the overloads are active. Override to true for custom date field scenarios (e.g., nested metadata dates).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.PatchAllAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery,Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IPatchOperation,Foundatio.Repositories.ICommandOptions)
member.summary: Patches all documents matching the query. Script and partial patches use Elasticsearch's update-by-query when caching is disabled; otherwise they fall back to batch processing. JsonPatch and ActionPatch always use batch processing with conflict retry.

remarks.para: When using ScriptPatch or PartialPatch with update-by-query, version conflicts are silently skipped (Conflicts.Proceed). The returned count reflects only successfully patched documents. Conflicting documents are not retried.
For guaranteed delivery to individual documents, use which uses RetriesOnConflict.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.AddPropertyRequiredForRemove(System.String)
member.summary: Registers a field that must always be included when fetches documents for deletion. This ensures critical fields (needed for cache invalidation, notifications, or event handlers) are returned even when the caller has specified a restricted include set. Id and CreatedUtc (when applicable) are registered automatically.
member.remarks: To ensure a field is included in all source-filtered operations (not just removes), use instead.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.GetDocumentTenantKey(`0)
member.summary: Gets the tenant key from the document for custom field tenant-scoped lookups.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.GetDocumentCustomFields(`0)
member.summary: Gets the custom fields dictionary from the document (Data for , or the virtual fields collection for ).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.SetDocumentCustomField(`0,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets a custom field value on the document. If is null, the field is removed via to prevent stale data.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.RemoveDocumentCustomField(`0,System.String)
member.summary: Removes a custom field from the document's data store. For documents this removes the key from Data; for it delegates to .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.GetDocumentCustomField(`0,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a single custom field value by name from the document.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.GetDocumentIdx(`0)
member.summary: Gets the indexed custom field values dictionary (Idx) from the document.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.NotificationsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether entity change notifications are published to the message bus. When enabled, messages are published after add, save, and remove operations. Defaults to true if a message bus is configured.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.OriginalsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether original document state is tracked during save operations. When enabled, the original document is preserved before modifications, allowing change detection (e.g., for soft delete transitions). Defaults to false.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.BatchNotifications
member.summary: Gets or sets whether notifications for multiple documents are batched together. When enabled, bulk operations may consolidate notifications. Defaults to false.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.NotificationDeliveryDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the delivery delay for entity change notifications. When set, notifications are delayed by the specified duration before being delivered to subscribers. This can be useful to allow Elasticsearch indexing to complete before consumers read the updated documents. Defaults to null (immediate delivery).

remarks.para: Warning: Only set a delay if your message bus implementation supports delayed delivery. Message buses that do not support delayed delivery may silently drop messages, resulting in message loss. The in-memory message bus supports delayed delivery, but other implementations may not.

member.exception: Thrown when the value is negative.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.GetUpdatedUtcFieldPath
member.summary: Returns the Elasticsearch dot-path for the updated timestamp field (e.g., "updatedUtc" or "metaData.dateUpdatedUtc"). Called only when is true.
member.exception: Thrown when is true but no field path is available. Override this method when using custom date fields.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.SetDocumentDates(`0,System.TimeProvider)
member.summary: Sets date properties on the document for Add, Save, and ActionPatch/JsonPatch-bulk operations. Override to handle custom date fields (e.g., IHaveDateMetaData.MetaData.DateUpdatedUtc).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.ApplyDateTracking(Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ScriptPatch)
member.summary: Injects the updated timestamp into a by appending a Painless assignment and adding the timestamp as a script parameter. Skips injection if the caller already provided the parameter (logged at Debug level).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.ApplyDateTracking(Foundatio.Repositories.Models.PartialPatch)
member.summary: Injects the updated timestamp into a by adding the field to the serialized document. Skips injection if the caller already provided the field (logged at Debug level).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.ElasticRepositoryBase`1.ApplyDateTracking(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Sets the updated timestamp on a document (used by single-doc JsonPatch). Supports nested dot-path fields.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.FieldIncludeParser
member.summary: Allocation-free parser for Google FieldMask-style expressions that specify nested field paths.

remarks.para: Duplicate field names at the same nesting level are merged so their sub-fields combine. Use for the common case of getting flattened dotted path strings.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.FieldIncludeParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a field mask expression string and returns the structured result.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.FieldIncludeParser.ParseFieldPaths(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a field mask expression and returns the flattened dotted field paths. For example, "results(id,program(name))" returns ["results.id", "results.program.name"].

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.FieldIncludeParseResult
member.summary: The result of parsing a field mask expression via . Contains the hierarchical list of parsed fields and a validity flag. Use to flatten the result into dotted path strings.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.FieldIncludeParseResult.ToFieldPaths
member.summary: Flattens the hierarchical field structure into a list of dotted path strings (e.g., ["results.id", "results.program.name"]).

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.FieldInclude
member.summary: Represents a single field in a parsed field mask expression. A field has a and an optional list of representing nested fields grouped by parentheses.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.PainlessFieldPath.IdentifierRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z_a-z].
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.Elasticsearch.Utility.PainlessFieldPath._painlessReservedWords
member.summary: Painless reserved words that cannot be used as dot-notation identifiers.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.QueryExpressionsExtensions.SystemFilter``1(``0,Foundatio.Repositories.ISystemFilter)
member.summary: System filter that will be applied to the repository query to enforce tenancy or system rules

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.QueryExpressionsExtensions.FilterExpression``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Default Search operator is AND. Does boolean matching and no scoring will occur.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.QueryExpressionsExtensions.SearchExpression``1(``0,System.String,Foundatio.Repositories.SearchOperator)
member.summary: Default Search operator is OR and scoring will occur.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldCondition
member.summary: Represents a single field-level comparison condition used to build Elasticsearch filter clauses via the repository query pipeline.
member.remarks: Each condition specifies a , an , and an optional . The Elasticsearch query builder translates these into the appropriate Elasticsearch query (TermQuery, TermsQuery, MatchQuery, ExistsQuery, DateRangeQuery, NumericRangeQuery, etc.) at build time.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator
member.summary: Defines the type of comparison a performs.

list.item: Exact match on a specific value? → (keyword field, case-sensitive)
Full-text search across words? → (analyzed field, tokenized, order-independent)
Check if a field has any value? → /

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.Equals
member.summary: Exact match. Generates TermQuery (single value) or TermsQuery (multiple values) on the non-analyzed (.keyword) field. Null values are rewritten to .

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.NotEquals
member.summary: Negated exact match. Generates BoolQuery { MustNot = TermQuery/TermsQuery } on the non-analyzed field. Null values are rewritten to .

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.IsEmpty
member.summary: Field does not exist or has no value. Generates BoolQuery { MustNot = ExistsQuery }.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.HasValue
member.summary: Field exists and has a value. Generates ExistsQuery.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.Contains
member.summary: Full-text token matching on analyzed fields. Generates MatchQuery { Operator = And }. All input tokens must be present (order-independent). Does NOT support wildcard or substring matching. Null values are rewritten to .

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.NotContains
member.summary: Negated full-text token matching. Generates BoolQuery { MustNot = MatchQuery }. Null values are rewritten to .

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.GreaterThan
member.summary: Strictly greater than. Generates DateRangeQuery (DateTime/DateTimeOffset), NumericRangeQuery (int/long/double/float/decimal), or TermRangeQuery (string).

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.GreaterThanOrEqual
member.summary: Greater than or equal. Generates the same range query types as with an inclusive lower bound.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.LessThan
member.summary: Strictly less than. Generates the same range query types as with an exclusive upper bound.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.ComparisonOperator.LessThanOrEqual
member.summary: Less than or equal. Generates the same range query types as with an inclusive upper bound.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroupOperator
member.summary: Defines the boolean operator used to combine conditions within a . Named FieldConditionGroupOperator to avoid conflict with Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.GroupOperator.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroupOperator.And
member.summary: All conditions must match. Generates BoolQuery { Must = [...] }.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroupOperator.Or
member.summary: At least one condition must match. Generates BoolQuery { Should = [...], MinimumShouldMatch = 1 }.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroupOperator.Not
member.summary: No condition must match (AND-NOT semantics). Generates BoolQuery { MustNot = [...] }. Multiple conditions mean NOT A AND NOT B (exclude documents matching any clause). For NOT (A AND B), nest an explicit group inside .

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup
member.summary: Groups multiple field conditions under a boolean operator (AND, OR, NOT).

remarks.para: Empty groups (no conditions and no children) are silently skipped at build time.
Single-item groups are unwrapped to avoid unnecessary BoolQuery nesting.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup`1
member.summary: Strongly-typed version of that provides -based overloads for compile-time safety and IntelliSense support.

remarks.para: Or use the lambda-based API on IRepositoryQuery<T>:

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup`1.Or
member.summary: Creates an OR group. At least one child condition must match.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup`1.And
member.summary: Creates an AND group. All child conditions must match.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup`1.Not
member.summary: Creates a NOT group. No child condition must match (AND-NOT semantics).

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding field conditions to repository queries. These are the primary API for building type-safe Elasticsearch filter clauses without dropping to raw NEST QueryContainer objects.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldContains``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.Object)
member.summary: Full-text token match on an analyzed field. Generates MatchQuery { Operator = And }. All tokens in the value must be present in the field (order-independent).

remarks.para: This is NOT wildcard or substring matching. FieldContains(f => f.Name, "Er") will NOT match "Eric" because "er" is not a complete token.
Throws at build time if the field is a non-analyzed (keyword) field.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldContains``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.Object[])
member.summary: Full-text token match with multiple values joined as space-separated tokens. All tokens must be present (AND semantics, order-independent).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldNotContains``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.Object)
member.summary: Negated full-text token match. Generates BoolQuery { MustNot = MatchQuery }.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldHasValue``1(``0,Nest.Field)
member.summary: Filters to documents where the field exists and has a value. Generates ExistsQuery.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldEquals``1(``0,Nest.Field,System.Object)
member.summary: Exact match filter on the non-analyzed (.keyword) field. Generates TermQuery (single value) or TermsQuery (multiple values). Null values are rewritten to .

remarks.para: Target field type: keyword, numeric, boolean, date. For full-text search on analyzed fields, use FieldContains instead.
Throws at build time if the field is an analyzed text field with no .keyword sub-field.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldNotEquals``1(``0,Nest.Field,System.Object)

M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldGreaterThan``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.Object)
member.summary: Strictly greater than comparison. Generates DateRangeQuery (DateTime/DateTimeOffset), NumericRangeQuery (numeric types), or TermRangeQuery (string).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldGreaterThanOrEqual``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.Object)
member.summary: Greater than or equal comparison.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldLessThan``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.Object)
member.summary: Strictly less than comparison.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldLessThanOrEqual``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.Object)
member.summary: Less than or equal comparison.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldAnd``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Action{Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup{``0}})
member.summary: Adds an AND group. All child conditions must match. Generates BoolQuery { Must = [...] }.
member.remarks: At the top query level, AND is the default behavior. This method is available for explicitness and for nesting inside OR/NOT groups.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldNot``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Action{Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup{``0}})
member.summary: Adds a NOT group. No child condition must match (AND-NOT semantics). Generates BoolQuery { MustNot = [...] }.
member.remarks: Multiple conditions inside NOT produce NOT A AND NOT B (exclude documents matching ANY clause). For NOT (A AND B), nest an explicit AND group inside NOT.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldOr``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},System.Action{Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup{``0}})
member.summary: Adds an OR group where at least one child condition must match. Generates BoolQuery { Should = [...] }.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionQueryExtensions.FieldOr``1(Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery{``0},Foundatio.Repositories.FieldConditionGroup{``0})
member.summary: Adds a pre-built OR group. Use for dynamic/conditional group building.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesQueryExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring field includes and excludes on . These control Elasticsearch _source filtering to limit which fields are returned. Includes and excludes from the query are merged with those from at execution time. If the same field appears in both includes and excludes, the include takes precedence.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesQueryExtensions.Include``1(``0,Nest.Field)
member.summary: Adds a field to the set of included fields returned from Elasticsearch _source filtering. Multiple calls are additive. These are merged with any includes set via and with includes from .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesQueryExtensions.IncludeMask``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a field mask expression that specifies which fields to include. The expression uses a Google FieldMask-style syntax where nested fields are grouped with parentheses (e.g., "id,address(street,city)" expands to id, address.street, address.city). The parsed fields are merged with any individually added via .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesQueryExtensions.Exclude``1(``0,Nest.Field)
member.summary: Adds a field to the set of excluded fields omitted from Elasticsearch _source filtering. Multiple calls are additive. These are merged with any excludes set via and with excludes from . If the same field appears in both includes and excludes, the include takes precedence.
member.remarks: Setting any explicit excludes on a query will cause default excludes (registered via AddDefaultExclude on the repository) to be skipped.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesQueryExtensions.ExcludeMask``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a field mask expression that specifies which fields to exclude. The expression uses a Google FieldMask-style syntax where nested fields are grouped with parentheses (e.g., "internal(data,logs)" expands to internal.data, internal.logs). The parsed fields are merged with any individually added via .

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesCommandExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring field includes and excludes on . These control Elasticsearch _source filtering to limit which fields are returned. Includes and excludes from command options are merged with those from at execution time. If the same field appears in both includes and excludes, the include takes precedence.
member.remarks: ID-based caching is skipped when includes or excludes are active to avoid storing incomplete documents in the cache.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesCommandExtensions.Include``1(``0,Nest.Field)
member.summary: Adds a field to the set of included fields returned from Elasticsearch _source filtering. Multiple calls are additive. These are merged with any includes set via and with includes from .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesCommandExtensions.IncludeMask``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a field mask expression that specifies which fields to include. The expression uses a Google FieldMask-style syntax where nested fields are grouped with parentheses (e.g., "id,address(street,city)" expands to id, address.street, address.city). The parsed fields are merged with any individually added via .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesCommandExtensions.Exclude``1(``0,Nest.Field)
member.summary: Adds a field to the set of excluded fields omitted from Elasticsearch _source filtering. Multiple calls are additive. These are merged with any excludes set via and with excludes from . If the same field appears in both includes and excludes, the include takes precedence.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesCommandExtensions.ExcludeMask``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a field mask expression that specifies which fields to exclude. The expression uses a Google FieldMask-style syntax where nested fields are grouped with parentheses (e.g., "internal(data,logs)" expands to internal.data, internal.logs). The parsed fields are merged with any individually added via .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.FieldIncludesCommandExtensions.RequiredFields``1(``0,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Nest.Field})
member.summary: Registers fields that must always be included when any _source field restrictions are active. These are typically set by the repository via ConfigureOptions to carry AddRequiredField registrations into the query builder pipeline.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the IdentifierRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.IdentifierRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiWordChars
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
